⋆｡°✩ Cut line I thought was funny: “Sitting in the lap of luxury is something everyone dreams of. Whether they mean it literally or not is up to interpretation.”

⋆｡°✩ The last time I made a Curly bot was for Valentine’s Day LMFAO 😭 I need to branch out more
